description_long: This is a classic, cylindrical fire hydrant with a domed top and a robust, industrial design, painted in a deep reddish-brown color. The hydrant features three prominent hose connection outlets: two on the sides and one on the front, each capped and secured with metallic chains. The base is wide and circular, providing stability, and is bolted to the ground, typical for urban installations. The surface shows signs of wear and weathering, with some areas appearing slightly darker, suggesting exposure to the elements. The top of the hydrant has a central operating nut, used for opening the valve, and the chains are attached to the caps to prevent loss. No manufacturer or model markings are visible on the exterior.
description: A robust, reddish-brown fire hydrant with three capped outlets, metallic chains, and a domed top, showing signs of weathering.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central outlet with a cap and chain, flanked by two side outlets and a clear view of the domed top.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the right side outlet and chain, with the front outlet partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hydrant, both side outlets, and the absence of a rear outlet.
description_view_3: Angled view from the left, showing the left side outlet and chain, with the front outlet partially visible.
